title: Lightning Onion Messages
description: Unreliable, channel-independent encrypted messages forwarded over blinded onion paths. Onion messages let Lightning peers transport requests and responses without requiring a payment HTLC or exposing the sender's destination topology.

resources.title: BOLT 04: Onion Routing Protocol
resources.notes: Canonical specification for forwarding onion messages over blinded paths without a payment channel.

resources.title: BOLT 09: Features
resources.notes: Defines the option_onion_messages capability used to negotiate support.

resources.title: Mastering the Lightning Network
resources.notes: Provides broader context for Lightning onion routing, privacy, and channel-independent communication.
